## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

Fixes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] AI-writing marker update
- [ ] Technical terminology whitelist update
- [ ] Skill instruction update
- [ ] Eval update
- [ ] Documentation or GitHub configuration

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run validate` or `python scripts/validate.py`.
- [ ] I updated `evals.json` for behavior changes.
- [ ] I kept `SKILL.md` lean and moved detailed rules to `references/`.
- [ ] I preserved technical terminology unless the change intentionally updates terminology behavior.
- [ ] I did not include private profile data, secrets, or personal writing samples without permission.
